article.title: Noizekid: Mexican Moombahton and Dancehall Producer
article.subtitle: Collaborations with DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, and Major Lazer define his sound.
article.author: D. Varela
article.excerpt: Noizekid is a Mexican moombahton and dancehall producer known for his work with prominent artists and his release of the 'Noizekid Sample Pack' in collaboration with Barnation.

content.text: Noizekid is a Mexican moombahton and dancehall producer known for working with the likes of DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, Major Lazer and several other names in the music industry.
He released the 'Noizekid Sample Pack' in collaboration with Barnation, which includes all of his samples, loops and drums used in various of his works.
His sound is rooted in the energetic rhythms of moombahton and dancehall, and his production choices reflect a keen understanding of these genres.
Noizekid's work is contextualized within the broader Latin electronic scene, with similar artists including ETC!ETC!, Los Dutis, LOOJAN, Bsno, and Freebot.
